description_long: This object is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base, featuring a two-part upright headstone made of polished black stone with a distinctive geometric design. The headstone consists of two vertical slabs, one with a rounded top and the other with a straight edge, separated by a narrow gap. The grave is bordered by a raised, light gray stone frame, and the central area is covered with a matching stone slab. The materials appear to be high-quality granite or marble, giving the structure a sleek and durable appearance. The monument is devoid of visible inscriptions, crosses, or decorative motifs, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction suggests permanence and resistance to weathering, suitable for a contemporary cemetery setting.
description: A modern grave monument with a geometric black headstone and a light gray stone base, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-part black headstone with a rounded and straight edge, set on a rectangular stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the upright headstone and the layered stone base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headstone and the full length of the stone slab covering the grave.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone and the raised stone border.
